prompt: A massive photorealistic mosaic portrait filling the entire frame. The mosaic depicts a RED human face when viewed as a whole. But every individual tile is BLUE. Not a single tile is red. Yet together they form something unmistakably red. Mood: clinical, eerie, impossible. No text, no numbers, no labels. Photorealistic.
visual_logic: A mosaic face appears entirely red as a whole, yet every individual tile is blue. Group and individual properties are opposite — what is true of the whole is true of none of its parts.
